reference: Hello, pain in the left side of the shoulder can arise from the heart or any inflammatory condition of the upper abdomen. Both need to be checked in a hospital. A viral infection of the nerves called herpes initially starts as you mentioned and then later develops into vesicles.
text: Hello, the left side of the shoulder can arise from the heart or any inflammatory condition of the upper abdomen. Both need to be checked in a hospital. A viral infection of the nerves, called herpes, initially starts as you mentioned and then later develops into vesicles.
